features.name: /live page: real-time scrolling activity feed via SSE from orchestrator-activity.jsonl
/queue page: table of pending/active/completed tasks from Supabase company_tasks with status badges
/agents page: card per agent (engineering, marketing, ops) with status, last action, tasks today count
/metrics page: daily summary — tasks completed, success rate, commits pushed, posts published
SSE endpoint: GET /api/stream/activity — tails orchestrator-activity.jsonl and pushes new lines as SSE events
Activity line renderer: color-coded by agent type (blue=engineering, green=marketing, yellow=ops, red=error)
Auto-scroll live feed with pause-on-hover behavior (like a terminal feed)
Filter bar on /live: filter feed by agent type (All / Engineering / Marketing / Ops) and status (Success / Error)
Recent commits widget on /engineering: last 10 Git commits across repos from engineering-agent.jsonl
Deploy status widget: live Vercel deployment status per service (green=READY, yellow=BUILDING, red=ERROR)
Test coverage trend: feature pass count over time rendered as a sparkline chart (Recharts)
Recent posts widget on /marketing: last 10 posts with platform icon, content preview, engagement stats
Engagement chart: 7-day line chart of likes + views per platform (Twitter/IG/Threads) using Recharts
Top performer card: best post this week with hook text, platform, metrics, and classification label
ACD health widget: queue PID alive, heartbeat age, current repo, % complete from ACD queue-status.json
Safari services status grid: green/red health indicator per port (3003/3005/3007/3106) via /health polling
Orchestrator uptime counter: time since last restart, formatted as '2d 4h 12m'
API: GET /api/status returns full JSON snapshot of all panels for programmatic / embedding use
Mobile-responsive layout with Tailwind CSS (grid collapses to single column on mobile)
Dark mode terminal aesthetic: dark background (#0d0d0d), monospace font for activity feed, colored badges
